title: CHOCOLATE
description: what's better than vanilla?, CHOCOLATE! (enhanced vanilla Minecraft)
body:
# **CHOCOLATE**
![discontinued](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6223af97622f53d1dc67e91bb40f7fcf52c974e3.png)
chocolate is a vanilla+ modpack updated to the latest versions of minecraft starting from 1.20.6

chocolate adds many QOL features with most parts of the mods not being obstructing normal vannila gamplay. chocolate also includes many resource packs so you can mix and match to your liking.
